Sport|Olympics

Lin Yu-Tingis a big favourite as she goes up against Julia Szeremeta for Olympic gold in Paris tonight.

The Taiwanese boxer, likeImane Khelif, has faced accusations she should not be competing at theOlympicsafter claims from the International Boxing Association that she failed a gender eligibility test.

Lin, who has gold medals at the World Championships and Asian Games, eased past Esra Yildiz Kahraman in her semi-final and now has the chance to be crowned featherweight champion.

Poland’s Szeremeta is her final opponent, and the 20-year-old has insisted she is full of belief that she can pull off an upset against Lin.

“I'm not afraid of anyone,” Szeremeta said.

“I don't feel respect. I go out and do my thing. I can't wait for the final.

Lin Yu-Ting takes on Julia Szeremeta in the women's featherweight gold-medal fight.

The gold-medal bout is scheduled for 8:30pm BST tonight, Saturday, August 10.

TV channel:In the UK, Imane Khelief’s final will be shown on Eurosport and the BBC.

Live stream: Subscribers can visit the discovery+ |Paris 2024app and website to watch the fight in full, while you can also watch live online for free via the BBC Sport and BBC iPlayer.

Live blog: Follow live coverage of the fight withStandard Sport’s rolling Olympics blog, with expert analysis from reporters Matt Majendie and Malik Ouzia in Paris.

title: When is Lin Yu-Ting fighting at Olympics 2024? Start time and TV channel for boxing gold medal fight | The Standard
author: Matt Verri
description: The 20-year-old Szeremeta looks to upset the odds against Lin
keywords: Lin Yu-Ting, Paris 2024, Olympic Games, Imane Khelif
